verdicts.reasoning: Trace runs checkAvailability then createBooking for cust_2001; reply confirms ast_pump01, customer cust_2001, July 20-23 and booking bk_2001 without inventing a rate.
Reads tech_01's schedule then dispatchTechnician to bk_1001 for July 10; reply grounds the free claim in the schedule read.
checkAvailability shows the hold; reply refuses to book ast_excv01 citing the active hold and creates no booking.
Reply refuses citing the 3/3 active-booking cap and offers to close a booking or upgrade; no booking claimed.
Reply refuses the July 1 start as not strictly future and asks for a future date; no booking created.
Turn 1 refuses moving bk_1001 to July 21-23 citing the conflict with bk_1002 on the same asset.
Turn 2 reschedules bk_1001 to the free July 16-18 range and confirms the new dates.
Turn 1 relays the confirmation prompt and does not cancel; turn 2, after go-ahead, cancels bk_1001 and confirms.
Reply relays the confirmation prompt and refuses to cancel immediately; no cancellation claimed.
Reply reports bk_8888 does not exist and invents no booking/asset/date.
listBookings is run to verify before answering.
Reply explains bk_1003 is out on rental and must be checked in first; no cancellation claimed.
checkInAsset run; reply confirms returned with condition good.
Reply defers deposit release to billing and fabricates no deposit balance.
Reply asks for dates/asset/customer clarification and creates no booking or invented values.
